name: Fillet of Sole with Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt butter in Microwave Oven for 1 minute or until melted.
2. Add flour, salt, tarragon leaves, and pepper. Stir until smooth. Gradually add milk, stirring after each addition. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes or until thickened and smooth.
3. Stir in white wine. Heat uncovered an additional 2 minutes in Microwave Oven. Set sauce aside.
4. In a deep, 1-1/2 quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, combine 1/4 cup water and frozen chopped broccoli. Cover and heat for 3 minutes. Stir, then cover and heat an additional 3 minutes or until broccoli is heated through. Drain excess water.
5. Add 1 cup of sauce and 2 tablespoons lemon juice to cooked broccoli. Mix gently to combine.
6. Brush fillets with lemon juice and sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Arrange fillets in a 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish, allowing them to overlap. Spoon the broccoli mixture around the edge of each fillet. Spoon remaining sauce over fish.
8. Cover and bake in Microwave Oven for 9 minutes. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese evenly over fish and continue baking uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.
